positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic sloth meditating on a crescent moon. The sloth has gentle, glowing nebulae patterns forming its fur, giving it a sense of deep space and tranquility. The background is a gradient blend of deep indigo, lavender, and midnight blue, dotted with stylized, geometric constellations. The style should be modern psychedelic art mixed with clean line art, highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use strong silhouettes and vibrant, contrasted glowing elements against the deep background. Central composition, highly detailed, vector-art quality.
negative: photorealistic, grayscale, blur, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, messy, amateur, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy
